AddTbspProtocolBlocking.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.ip: Protected object IP address of the DDoS Enhanced Protection Package
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.protocolPortList.type: Protocol blocking type of the DDoS Enhanced Protection Package, including icmp, tcp, and udp
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.protocolPortList.portBegin: Start port value of the protocol blocking rule in the DDoS Enhanced Protection Package
AddTbspProtocolBlocking.protocolPortList.portEnd: End port value of the protocol blocking rule in the DDoS Enhanced Protection Package
